seo.title: Install haex-vault - haex.space
seo.description: Step-by-step install guides for haex-vault on macOS, Linux, Windows, Android and iOS.

install.title: Install haex-vault
install.subtitle: Pick your platform and follow the steps. Updates flow through your system's package manager automatically.
install.rawBinariesNote: Looking for direct binary downloads (AppImage, MSI, raw .deb/.rpm)?

android.title: Android
android.description: Sideload the universal APK from the latest GitHub release. Google Play distribution is on the roadmap.

ios.title: iOS
ios.description: App Store distribution is in preparation.

brew.title: Homebrew
brew.description: Tap our Homebrew cask. Works on both Apple Silicon and Intel — Homebrew picks the right binary automatically.

dmg.title: Download the DMG manually
dmg.description: Prefer to skip Homebrew? Grab the signed DMG (Apple Silicon or Intel) directly from the GitHub release.

apt.title: Debian / Ubuntu — APT
apt.description: Add the apt.haex.space repository. Supports amd64 and arm64.

dnf.title: Fedora / RHEL / Rocky / Alma — DNF / YUM
dnf.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository. Supports x86_64 and aarch64.

zypper.title: openSUSE — Zypper
zypper.description: Add the rpm.haex.space repository to zypper.

appimage.title: AppImage (no install)
appimage.description: Self-contained binary. Download, mark executable, run. Updates are manual (re-download).

installer.title: Windows Installer (.exe / .msi)
installer.description: Download and run the installer. Both the MSI and EXE flavours are available on the downloads page.

winget.title: winget
winget.description: Native Windows package manager support is planned.
